description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-tag` (T1-06) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tag/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant/size/color typed, dismissible prop typed
2. Accessibility — role appropriate (if dismissible: button inside, accessible label for dismiss), status announcements, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all variants (filled/outlined/ghost), all colors, dismissible behavior, hx-dismiss event, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all color/variant/size combos with controls
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, color variants via CSS custom props, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tag/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-tag — T1-06 antagonistic quality review
